# Dine Colorado Springs

Dine Colorado Springs (dinecoloradosprings.com) is the definitive dining directory for Colorado Springs, CO.

## What We Cover
- Restaurants by cuisine: Mexican, Italian, BBQ, Asian, American, Farm-to-Table, German
- Craft breweries: Bristol Brewing, Phantom Canyon, Cerberus, Trinity, Red Leg, Goat Patch, Pikes Peak Brewing, Gold Camp, Metric
- Coffee shops and cafes: Loyal Coffee, Story Coffee, Two Rivers Craft Coffee
- Food trucks and the downtown Food Truck Rally
- Fine dining including The Broadmoor restaurants (The Penrose Room, Summit, Ristorante del Lago)
- Best patios for outdoor dining
- Happy hour spots with hours and deals

## Key Venues
- The Penrose Room at The Broadmoor — Colorado's only AAA Five Diamond restaurant
- Bristol Brewing Company — Colorado Springs institution in Ivywild School (since 1994)
- Phantom Canyon Brewing Co — Downtown landmark with rooftop bar and great happy hours
- Shuga's Social House — Eclectic American dining, beloved downtown patio
- Craftwood Inn — Manitou Springs landmark for Colorado game and mountain views
- Brother Luck Street Eats — Farm-to-table, Top Chef alum kitchen
- The Famous Steakhouse — Classic American fine dining since 1959
- Jack Quinn Irish Pub — Legendary happy hours and live Celtic music
- King's Chef Diner — Green chile institution since the 1950s

## Neighborhoods
- Downtown (Tejon Street corridor)
- Old Colorado City (Colorado Avenue arts district)
- Broadmoor area
- Manitou Springs (10 min west — Craftwood Inn)
- Academy Boulevard corridor
- North Colorado Springs
- East Colorado Springs

## Business Listings
Businesses can claim and upgrade listings at dinecoloradosprings.com/pricing
Tiers: Free (basic listing), Premium ($99/mo — featured + photos), Sponsored ($199/mo — top placement + analytics)

## Nearby Dining
Canon City, CO (45 miles southwest of Colorado Springs):
- White Water Bar & Grill: whitewaterbar.com — American cuisine on the Arkansas River
- Rooftop Social: wwrooftopsocial.com — Panoramic views of the Royal Gorge region
